name: Jason Dean
description:
❤️‍🔥|Dead Girl/Boy/person walking, Ride him till he breaks .

I recently updated my bot to adapt to my new writing style after being on this website for a while. I know people don’t like when the intro talks for them, so I did my best to write in J.D’s pov.

the old intro is still available!!!
